item.title: Walker Honey Co: Fain s Blackberry Honey Spread, 12oz net wt., Recall
item.product: Fain s Blackberry Honey Spread, 12oz net wt.,
item.summary: Creamed honey products may contain stainless steel dust/flakes and/or small particles or shreds of plastic. Product details: Fain s Blackberry Honey Spread, 12oz net wt., UPC 01832213862
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
